text: Set Up a Microsite | HackerRank Knowledge Base Set Up a Microsite You can set up a microsite to present your event details, customize the candidate experience, and promote your employer brand. Setting up a microsite for coding challenges To configure a microsite for a coding challenge event: Steps 1: Access microsite editor To access microsite editor: Log in to Engage using your credentials. Log in to Engage using your credentials. Select the event you want to edit. Select the event you want to edit. In the left panel, select Microsite . In the left panel, select Microsite . Click Edit . Click Edit . Steps 2: Update content layout Use the Content tab to add or modify microsite sections: Edit default sections such as Event Details , About Company , Testimonials , and FAQs . Edit default sections such as Event Details , About Company , Testimonials , and FAQs . Generate a banner image using AI. Edit the section that includes your event name. In the Cover Photo/Video section, select the Image tab. Describe the image you want in the provided textbox. You can use the suggested prompts as inspiration, if needed. (Optional) Click the picture icon to import your logo into the image prompt. Click the green submit arrow button to generate the banner. The AI generates a customized banner that includes your event name. Note: You can regenerate the banner image up to five times to explore alternate versions. If you prefer to use your own banner image, select Upload Image to add a banner image. Generate a banner image using AI. Edit the section that includes your event name.
